paragraphs: Hello! I am Dennis Zubov. Interested in Development, Engineering and Finance.

In my free time, I enjoy playing soccer, chess, and reading books. I enjoy solving challening problems using my engineering and programming skills. Born and raised in South Africa, graduated from Georgia Tech in Atlanta, currently working in New York City. Please message me on LinkedIn if you would like an up-to-date resume or more information about my qualifications and experience!

education.title: BS in Computer Engineering
details: Concentrations: Information Internetworks, Distributed System & Software Design

education.title: Exchange Program (France)
details: One semester exchange program in Metz, France.
Took French classes and immersed myself in the culture and language

skills.Quant & Trading: Systematic Trading, Signal & Strategy Implementation, Backtesting Frameworks, Rates Derivatives
skills.Data & Infrastructure: Pandas, NumPy, AWS, Linux, Git, CI/CD, Databases, Docker, Regression Testing, Python Profiling & Performance Optimization
skills.Systems: Operating Systems, CPU & Memory Virtualization, Concurrency

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: On-campus part-time for the ECE department at Georgia Tech. I'm building a financial reporting web application from zero to one. I'm leading the development of this application, in which we are using Python, Django, MySQL, Oracle DB. I led the hosting of the application using AWS services. We are using RDS, ECR, App Runner, EC2, IAM, and Secrets Manager.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: Worked on the Systematic Trading team.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: I completed a 6-month internship as a backend software engineer where I was mostly building API endpoints for the web application of a large mobile services provider in South Africa. I was introduced to the world of software engineering and loved it! I used Python with Django for most of my development.
